creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-05-25 19:05:47 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4 Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Add new port x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4:
  
  QtCurve is a set of widget styles for Qt4/KDE4, KDE3 and Gtk2 based apps.
  This port provides Qt4 style plugin.
  
  WWW:    http://www.kde-look.org/content/show.php?content=40492
  
  PR:             based on ports/146851
  Submitted by:   Yuri Pankov <yuri.pankov at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +30 -0     ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/x11-themes/qtcurve-qt4/pkg-descr (new)
